nodes.label: sanad-review-quiz.png
nodes.summary: UI screenshot of the Sanad legal app's Smart Review tab (المراجعة الذكية) within the Student View section. Shows a flashcard-based multiple-choice quiz in Arabic RTL layout. Displays card 1 of 32, presenting a legal case question about unjust enrichment (إثراء بلا سبب) referencing 'Al-Nour Foundation' case, with four selectable answer options rendered as distinct cards. Question is tagged with category 'قضية' (Case) and format 'اختيار من متعدد' (Multiple Choice). The nav bar exposes six tabs: Student Morning, Study Materials (5), Academic Dates, Terms Bank (16), Cases Bank (6), and Smart Review. A role toggle switches between Student (طالب) and Lawyer (محامي). Progress counter and a correct-answer indicator are visible. Bottom status bar reads: سند — لوحة العمليات اليومية للمحامين والمنشآت الصغيرة في السعودية.

properties.ui_pattern: flashcard quiz with multiple choice answers
